subtitle: The powerful evolution of RetroFE — now with VLC, smart addons & next-level customization
bento-whatis-p1: Forget the limitations of old frameworks. RetroFeVLC is a true next-generation evolution that replaces GStreamer with the powerful VLC Media Library. This delivers flawless 4K Pre-Scale rendering and a rock-solid, leak-free architecture built for arcade stability.
bento-whatis-p2: Whether you have 500 or 50,000+ games, enjoy ultra-smooth navigation and superior video playback that transforms your collection into a premium cinematic experience.
bento-start-p1: Stop struggling with text files. Our custom Start.exe serves as the central brain, giving you a clean, powerful GUI to control your entire setup instantly.
bento-list-2: Marquee Mastery: Native support for secondary monitors.
bento-list-3: Kiosk Mode: Transform Windows into a dedicated console.
bento-list-4: Ultra-Fast Search: Find any game instantly via controller.
bento-speed-p: Push boundaries with 3D Effects & Warp perspective. Thanks to Per-Game Layouts, every title can have its own unique, handcrafted visual identity.
bento-rank-p: Ranked among the top 5 retro gaming frontends in 2026. RetroFeVLC delivers lightweight performance with premium features and complete creative freedom — without the bloat.
upd-5: New Grid menu option & include files
guide-desc: RetroFeVLC Comprehensive User Guide — 35 pages. Complete manual covering Quick Start, Directory Structure, Settings & Controls Editors, Collections, Launchers, Metadata, Addons and all advanced features.
qs-li4: Right-click the tray icon for Settings & Controls.
legal-terms: RetroFeVLC is an open-source frontend software distributed under the GPL v3 license. This software is provided "as is", without warranty.
legal-downloads: All downloads and external resources are provided at your own risk.
legal-priv-p: This website complies with the GDPR.
legal-cookies: We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.
legal-ext-p: We are not responsible for the content or policies of external platforms.
footer-text: RetroFeVLC © 2026 • An open-source evolution of the RetroFE frontend
